title: Reduce plan command latency
summary: Uses the telemetry baseline to reduce avoidable latency in plan sync, query, task, and closeout command paths.
scope_items: Optimize the slowest plan-owned command families first, especially coordination, query, task, and closeout write paths if they dominate the baseline.
Preserve machine-state correctness and rendered planning surfaces while reducing repeated whole-state work.
done_when_items: The chosen plan command hotspots are measurably faster against the recorded baseline without stale tracking or index regressions.
The affected plan commands stay behaviorally identical apart from improved runtime.
